preferences: UI means styling and layout only — not React logic. React logic is impl work, not UI work.
Claude Opus is the right choice for anything artistic or human-skill-oriented: copywriting, naming, UX copy, visual design decisions, styling. Codex is the workhorse for everything mechanical.
For Notion task updates, use opencode/opencode-go/minimax-m2.7.
Do not trust the UI model picker/label when OpenCode Go models are missing from the list.
With OpenCode Go models, after spawning, verify runtime model with `paseo agent inspect <agent-id>` and confirm Model is opencode-go/minimax-m2.7.
Whenever you spawn an agent, assign the appropriate persona for the role and attach the relevant GAS and Paseo skills for that agent's task.
